mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupons WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND available = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupons (coupon_id, name, discount, min_amount, expire_date, available, user_id) VALUES (#{couponId}, #{name}, #{discount}, #{minAmount}, #{expireDate}, #{available}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE coupons SET coupon_id = #{couponId}, name = #{name}, discount = #{discount}, min_amount = #{minAmount}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, available = #{available}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE coupons SET available = #{available} WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT coupon_id, name, discount, min_amount, expire_date, available FROM coupons
